purpose: Internal admin panel for operating the PathFinder AI student platform — manage users, careers, content, AI features, jobs, and observability.

stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 with CSS custom properties (Inter font, primary #6366f1, match #2dd4bf)
stack.theme: Light + dark mode via 'dark' class on <html>

AdminLayout.globals: window.__sessionExpired() and window.__rateLimit(true) for demo triggers

features: Demo role switcher (Super Admin / Content Manager / Support / Analyst / Moderator)

Banners.RateLimitBanner: Shown when AI is throttled, with retry

screens.name: Admin Login
screens.purpose: Authenticate admins into the dashboard.

screens.name: Dashboard / Overview
screens.purpose: At-a-glance health and growth metrics for the platform.
contains: Header with date range badge + Sync Jobs action

14 PathFinder KPI cards: Total students, Active students (7d), CVs uploaded, CV analyses completed, Average CV score, Roadmaps generated, Job matches created, Avg match %, Interview sessions, Cover letters, AI token usage, Failed AI requests, RAG documents indexed
Job API sync status panel (Adzuna / JSearch / Remotive with health + last sync)
CV Analysis Volume bar chart (this week)

screens.name: Analytics
screens.purpose: Deeper trend exploration across the platform.
contains: Trend line / area / bar / pie charts

screens.name: AI Cost & Token Usage
screens.purpose: Track Gemini token spend and reliability.
contains: Tokens today, tokens this month, estimated cost, avg response time KPIs
Most used feature, most expensive feature, failed AI requests (24h)
Monthly budget progress bar with near-limit + over-budget warning banners

screens.name: API Health
screens.purpose: Monitor external integrations.
contains: Per-service cards: Gemini API, Gemini Embeddings, Adzuna, JSearch, Remotive
Last successful sync, last failed sync, error message

screens.name: Users
screens.purpose: List and manage student accounts.
contains: Add user modal with validation (name, email format, career, location)
Row actions: View, Edit, Open full profile (→ /users/:id), Delete

screens.name: User Details
screens.purpose: Full single-user profile across all platform features.
contains: Header card with avatar, name, status badge, email, title, country, joined date
13 tabs: Overview, Profile, Skills, CVs, CV Analyses, Roadmaps, Job Matches, Interviews, Cover Letters, Chat Sessions, AI Usage, Admin Notes, Activity
Overview KPI cards (CV score, roadmaps, matches, interviews, chats, tokens)

screens.name: Admins Management
screens.purpose: Invite and manage staff with admin access.

screens.name: Roles & Permissions
screens.purpose: Configure access levels.
contains: Role cards grid with user count + permission badges
Create / edit role modal with permissions input
Delete confirmation guarded when role has assigned users
Super Admin role is protected (cannot edit / delete)

screens.name: Career Paths
screens.purpose: Define career trajectories students can follow.

screens.name: Skills Management
screens.purpose: Catalog of skills used across paths/courses.
contains: Add / edit skill modal (name, category, level)

screens.name: Courses
screens.purpose: Curated learning courses mapped to careers.

screens.name: Roadmaps
screens.purpose: Step-by-step learning roadmaps.

screens.name: Learning Videos
screens.purpose: Manage educational videos linked to careers, skills, courses, roadmap steps, and interview / CV / AI guidance topics.
contains: 7 analytics cards: total videos, published, drafts, failed uploads, top skill, top career, storage used
Category filter (Career Path, Skill, Course, Roadmap Step, Interview Prep, CV Improvement, AI Career Guidance)
Status filter (draft, uploading, processing, published, private, failed)
Video table columns: Thumbnail, Title, Category, Skill, Career, Course, Duration, Status, Visibility, Uploader, Created, Actions

Upload modal with: drag-and-drop area, file picker (MP4/MOV/WebM up to 500MB), title, description, category, related skill/career/course/roadmap-step selectors, visibility (Public/Private/Draft), thumbnail upload, tags, save-as-draft + publish buttons
Upload UI states: idle, uploading (progress %), paused, processing, success, failed, retry, cancel
Validation: missing title, missing category, duplicate title, unsupported format, file too large, missing related-content warning
Row actions: View details, Edit, Copy URL, Publish/Unpublish, Retry upload (failed), Delete
Details drawer with embedded video player, all metadata fields, tag chips
Delete confirmation with extra warning when linked to an active course
Empty state (no videos vs no search results)

screens.name: RAG Knowledge Base
screens.purpose: Documents indexed for AI retrieval (Gemini Embeddings).
contains: Documents table: Title, Type, Status, Vector ID, Chunks, Uploaded by, Created date
Document type filter (Career, Skill, Course, Interview, General)
Upload document modal (PDF/MD/DOCX/TXT up to 20MB) with embedding progress bar
Indexing status badges: indexed, indexing (with progress), queued, failed (with error message)
Delete action with guard against deleting while indexing
Empty state for no documents vs filtered no-results

screens.name: Jobs List
screens.purpose: Manage job listings and external API syncs.
contains: Sync APIs action with spinner (partial-failure aware)
Add Job manually modal with validation

screens.name: Job Matches
screens.purpose: Inspect AI-generated user → job matches.

screens.name: API Sources
screens.purpose: External integrations powering jobs and AI.
contains: Delete confirmation, blocked when source is active and supplying jobs

screens.name: CV Analyses
screens.purpose: AI-driven CV scoring and feedback history.
contains: Rich details modal: CV preview pane, parsed text section, score with breakdown (Format/Skills/Impact/Match), Strengths, Weaknesses, Detected skills, Missing skills, Suggestions, Download original CV, Mark as reviewed

screens.name: Chat Sessions
screens.purpose: Inspect AI career chat conversations.

screens.name: Interview Sessions
screens.purpose: Mock-interview session records.

screens.name: Cover Letters
screens.purpose: AI-generated cover letters per user/job.

screens.name: AI Logs
screens.purpose: Per-request AI observability.
contains: Summary KPI strip (Requests today, Tokens today, Avg latency, …)

screens.name: Activity / Audit Logs
screens.purpose: Audit trail of every admin action.
contains: Table columns: Admin, Action, Module, Target type, Target ID, IP address, Created date
Filters: search, admin, module, action, date range (from/to)
Detail drawer showing old_data and new_data JSON diff
Empty state when filters return nothing

screens.name: System Settings
screens.purpose: Platform configuration with safe-save semantics.
contains: 7 tabs: General, Appearance, AI Models, Notifications, Security, Email, Data & Backups
General: app name, support email, locale, timezone
AI Models: model dropdowns, monthly token budget
Security: session timeout (5–1440 min validation), API key rotation modal
Email: SMTP config, send test email (simulated 80% success)
Data & Backups: retention days (min 7), auto backup with time, manual backup, export data, purge old logs (destructive confirm)

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Current admin's own account.
contains: Avatar upload (max 2MB; PNG/JPG/WebP) with size + mime errors
Change Password modal (current/next/confirm; min 8 chars, uppercase, number)
Active Sessions list with current marker, per-session revoke, and revoke-all
Danger Zone: delete account requiring exact email confirmation

screens.name: Notifications
screens.purpose: In-app notification inbox + preferences.
contains: Search + filter chips (All / Unread / User / Job / AI / System)
Type icons (user / job / ai / system / message)
Mark single read, mark all read (no-op toast when 0)
Delete single (confirm dialog), clear all (confirm dialog)
Empty state (no data vs filtered to nothing)
Preferences table with email + push toggles for newUsers / aiErrors / sourceDown / weeklyDigest events

screens.name: No Permission
screens.purpose: Hard fallback when a route is blocked by RBAC.
contains: Go back + Return to dashboard buttons

cross_cutting_edge_cases: Form validation with per-field error messages
Loading states on async actions (simulated with setTimeout)
Empty states with contextual copy and primary action
No-search-results state distinct from no-data state
Destructive confirm dialogs for delete/clear/purge
Permission-denied disabled buttons with tooltip
Hard route guard via ProtectedRoute → /no-permission
Role guard: cannot edit/delete Super Admin
Cannot delete an active API source supplying jobs
Cannot delete a RAG document while it is indexing
CSV import row-level validation errors
API sync partial failure feedback
AI token budget near-limit + exceeded states
Rate limit exceeded global banner
Maintenance mode global banner
Session expired modal forcing re-login
Toast feedback (success/error/info) on every mutation
File upload validation (size + mime type) for CVs, avatars, videos, RAG docs
Password strength validation
Typed confirmation for irreversible destructive actions
Dirty-state detection on settings + discard option
Unread badge in TopBar bell
